description: Aluminum and steel cans, foils, and containers.
preparation: Do not crush aluminum cans (they can be mis-sorted as paper in some facilities)
commonMistakes: Including scrap metal, hangers, or electronics
Leaving hazardous chemicals in metal containers
facts: Aluminum can be recycled indefinitely without losing its properties.
Recycling aluminum saves 95% of the energy required to produce it from raw bauxite ore.
An aluminum can recycled today will be back on a store shelf in as little as 60 days.
